scripts.lint: python3 scripts/ensure_venv.py && .venv/bin/python -m ruff check . && .venv/bin/python -m ruff format --check . && .venv/bin/python manage.py check --settings=config.settings.test
scripts.typecheck: python3 scripts/ensure_venv.py && .venv/bin/python -m compileall -q config canonos && .venv/bin/python manage.py check --settings=config.settings.test
